MainView.Title: Lang.Avalonia localization workspace
MainView.Subtitle: Switch cultures at runtime and verify formatted, fixed-culture, and module-scoped resources.
MainView.ProviderDescription: The active plugin normalizes resources behind ILangPlugin.
MainView.StorageDescription: Files or compiled resources are loaded once and cached by culture.
MainView.FallbackDescription: Missing translations return the default-culture value first, then the original key.
MainView.BindingRefresh: Changing the culture raises CultureChanged and refreshes every I18n binding.

ResourcePipelineView.Title: Resource pipeline
ResourcePipelineView.Description: Language files are parsed into culture dictionaries and shared by XAML and C# callers.
ResourcePipelineView.FormatSupport: JSON, XML, and RESX providers share one public API.
ResourcePipelineView.HotSwitch: Culture changes are applied without recreating the window.
ResourcePipelineView.Fallback: Default culture fallback keeps the UI readable when a translation is missing.
ResourcePipelineView.StrongKeys: Generated constants remove handwritten resource keys from views.

ValidationView.Title: Quality checks
ValidationView.Description: The sample exercises formatted strings, module namespaces, fixed cultures, and runtime switching.
ValidationView.MissingKeyPolicy: Unknown keys remain visible as the key text for fast diagnostics.
ValidationView.ThreadCulture: CurrentCulture and CurrentUICulture are synchronized for the active thread and new threads.
ValidationView.EmbeddedResources: Plugins can load resources from additional assemblies.
ValidationView.AnalyzerSupport: The Analysis package can generate constants during compilation.
